name: The Mournful Catacombs
description: An ancient burial site beneath the marsh, where the boundary between the living and the dead is dangerously thin.

discovery.message: The swamp gas momentarily clears, revealing a massive, skull-shaped stone entrance partially submerged in the muck.

requirements.description: The aura of pure malevolence at the entrance is so strong that only those with a steel will can even consider entering.

bone-hall.text: The walls of this hall are constructed entirely from polished human bones. A low, rhythmic chanting seems to emanate from the very stones.

choices.label: Walk toward the sound of the chanting.
[Perception 18] Search the wall for a hidden lever.
[Resolve 18] Attempt to silence the voices in your head.

cultist-ritual.text: You emerge into a large chamber where several hooded figures are performing a ritual over a glowing pit. They turn to you with empty eye sockets.

bone-lever-check.text: You trace your fingers over the smooth skulls until one eye socket feels different.
bone-lever-check.success_text: A section of the wall slides away, revealing a secret ossuary.
bone-lever-check.failure_text: A needle pricks your finger as you search.

bone-trap-damage.text: The needle was coated in ancient toxins. (Took 6 Poison Damage)

secret-ossuary.text: This hidden room contains the remains of saints. A holy relic sits on a velvet cushion.

psychic-shield-check.text: You focus your mind into a single, unbreakable point of light.
psychic-shield-check.success_text: The chanting falls silent. The spectral barriers in the next room vanish.
psychic-shield-check.failure_text: The voices scream in triumph. Your vision blurs as your mind cracks.

psychic-shield-fail.text: The mental agony is physical. (Took 10 Psychic Damage)

pit-of-despair.text: The ritual was a success. A massive shadow rises from the pit—a Wraith of the Catacombs.

silent-inner-sanctum.text: Because you silenced the voices, the Wraith remains trapped in the ethereal plane, allowing you to loot the chamber unhindered.

catacombs-end.text: With the Wraith defeated, you can finally claim the treasures it was guarding.
